task_completion.description: Load the Oswego dataset in Epi Info 7 Visual Dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 Visual Dashboard is open and the Data Source indicates the Oswego form from the Sample project is loaded.

task_completion.description: Apply filter for individuals who consumed vanilla ice cream
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Filters panel shows a condition where 'Vanilla' is equal to 'Yes' (or equivalent checked state).

task_completion.description: Apply filter for individuals who did not become ill
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Filters panel shows a condition where 'Ill' is equal to 'No' (or equivalent unchecked state).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct number of filtered records
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard record count displays exactly 32 records after both filters are applied.

task_completion.description: Export the filtered cohort to the specified CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, export confirmation, or file explorer window showing the exported file at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Vanilla_Healthy_Cohort.csv'.

task_completion.description: Save the dashboard workspace to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, confirmation message, or file explorer window showing the workspace saved as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Cohort_Analysis.cvs7'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Epi Info 7 GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Epi Info 7 graphical interface (menus, filter panels, export dialogs) rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the files.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Epi Info 7 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Epi Info 7 Visual Dashboard window is visible, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Files were generated by the application, not manually typed
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a text editor (like Notepad) to manually type out the CSV data or the XML/JSON structure of the .cvs7 workspace file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct filter criteria are Vanilla=Yes AND Ill=No. When correctly applied to the Oswego dataset, the resulting record count must be exactly 32 people. The expected CSV output path is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Vanilla_Healthy_Cohort.csv and the expected workspace path is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Cohort_Analysis.cvs7.
